headline: Zenlayer Named Digital Realty APAC Partner of the Year 2025
summary: LOS ANGELES, June 25, 2026--The distributed cloud for AI named Digital Realty’s APAC Partner of the Year for a second year for its leadership in AI infrastructure delivery.
